    Mobile Legends Professional League Indonesia (also known as MPL Indonesia or MPL ID) is a Professional League in Indonesia. For the 14th consecutive season, the league adopts a franchise system.


    Jump to Section:
     Teams Results News Format

    Format MPL Indonesia Season 17

    [edit]
    • All matches will be played with Annual Map Change
    • Every game, a map change will be implemented randomly.
      • Dangerous Grass - Dense bushes now cover key areas like Mid, Lord's pit, and turrets.
      • Broken Walls - New wall gaps open shortcuts across the map.
      • Flying Cloud - Near-base platforms let respawned heroes hover for 5 seconds, quickly reaching high ground.
      • Expanding Rivers - The river now spills into nearby lanes, boosting movement speed.
    • Regular Season: March 27th - May 24th, 2026
      • Double Round Robin
      • All Matches are Bo3
        • Earn 1 point for each match win
        • Earn 0 point for each match lose
      • Top 6 teams will advance to playoffs
    • Playoffs: June 10th - 14th, 2026
      • Hybrid elimination
        • 3rd to 6th seeded teams compete in Round 1 (Single elimination)
        • 1st and 2nd seeded teams receive a round bye and will start in Round 2 (Double elimination)
      • All matches (excl. Lower Bracket Final & Grand Final) are Bo5
      • Lower Bracket Final & Grand Final are Bo7
      • Top 2 qualifies to MSC 2026
